meta.title: gelatops — Gelato & Ice Cream Business Management Software
meta.description: gelatops is the all-in-one management platform for artisan gelato and ice cream businesses. Manage recipes, production planning, food costs, allergens, and online orders — all in one place.
meta.keywords: gelato management software, ice cream business software, gelato recipe management, production planning gelato, food cost calculator ice cream, allergen tracking gelato, gelateria management
meta.ogTitle: gelatops — Gelato & Ice Cream Business Management Software
meta.ogDescription: The all-in-one platform for artisan gelato makers. Recipes, production planning, food costs, allergen tracking and order integration — all in one place.
meta.twitterTitle: gelatops — Gelato & Ice Cream Business Management Software
meta.twitterDescription: The all-in-one platform for artisan gelato makers. Recipes, production planning, food costs, allergen tracking and order integration.
jsonld.appDescription: All-in-one management platform for artisan gelato and ice cream businesses. Manage recipes, production planning, food costs, allergens and online orders.
jsonld.offerDescription: Free starter plan available. Contact for pricing.
jsonld.faq1q: Do I need technical knowledge to use gelatops?
jsonld.faq1a: No. The interface is designed for gelato makers, not developers. If you can use a spreadsheet, you can use gelatops.
jsonld.faq2q: How does the order integration with my online shop work?
jsonld.faq2a: Your shop sends a webhook to gelatops when a customer pays. The order lands automatically in your production queue with the recipe pre-matched. We support any shop that can call a Stripe webhook.
jsonld.faq3q: What happens when I submit a production plan?
jsonld.faq3a: gelatops takes a snapshot of all items and current ingredient prices, writes it to your history, and clears the queue ready for new orders. The submitted plan is read-only — your shopping list is frozen in time.
jsonld.faq4a: You tag each ingredient with its EU allergens once. Every recipe that uses that ingredient automatically shows the correct allergen list. No manual recipe-level tagging needed.
jsonld.faq5q: Can I use gelatops for sorbets and vegan recipes?
jsonld.faq5a: Yes. gelatops works for any frozen product — gelato, sorbets, vegan, milk-based or fruit-based. The recipe system is ingredient-agnostic.
jsonld.faq6a: Yes. gelatops runs on AWS with encrypted connections, automated database backups, and private infrastructure. Your recipes are your competitive advantage — we treat them accordingly.
hero.heading:
Run your gelateria.
Not your spreadsheets.
hero.lead: gelatops is the all-in-one management platform for artisan gelato and ice cream businesses — recipes, production planning, costs, orders, allergens and more. All in one place.
pain.heading: Sound familiar?
pain.subheading: Managing a gelateria without the right tools means...
pain1.title: Recipes in scattered spreadsheets
pain1.desc: Version chaos, broken formulas, no cost visibility. Which tab is the latest version of Stracciatella?
pain2.title: Shopping lists made by hand
pain2.desc: Recalculated every production run, prone to errors — then still emailed or called in to your supplier manually.
pain3.title: No real-time food cost tracking
pain3.desc: You don't know your margin until it's too late. Prices change; your spreadsheet doesn't update itself.
pain4.title: Allergen compliance done manually
pain4.desc: One missed ingredient can be a legal and safety risk. EU food labelling law doesn't forgive spreadsheet oversights.
pain5.title: Orders disconnected from production
pain5.desc: Customer orders never automatically feed your production plan. More copying, more errors, more time lost.
pain6.title: Labels printed from Word files
pain6.desc: Time-consuming and not automatically updated when recipes change. A recipe tweak means a new label design session.
features.heading: Everything your gelateria needs
feature1.title: Recipe Management
feature1.desc: Build and manage all your ice cream and sorbet recipes. Set ingredient amounts per litre, track which recipes use which ingredients, and keep everything versioned and organised.
feature2.title: Real-Time Food Cost
feature2.desc: See the cost of every recipe at 1L, 5L, 10L and 15L instantly. Update ingredient prices once and every recipe recalculates automatically. Know your margins before you produce.
feature3.title: Production Planning
feature3.desc: Build production plans manually or let incoming orders populate them automatically. Submit a plan and get a frozen shopping list with prices locked at that moment in time.
feature4.title: Smart Shopping Lists
feature4.desc: Aggregate ingredient requirements across your entire production plan in one click. Export to CSV or print. Know exactly how much of everything to buy before you go to market.
feature5.title: Allergen Tracking
feature5.desc: Tag ingredients with EU allergens once. Every recipe automatically inherits the correct allergen list. Stay compliant with food labelling regulations without extra manual work.
feature6.title: Order Integration
feature6.desc: Connect your online shop via Stripe webhooks. Customer orders automatically land in your production queue with the right recipe IDs. No double entry, no missed orders.
feature7.title: Smart Recipe Balancing
feature7.desc: Automatically adjust ingredient ratios within seconds to achieve the perfect texture at serving temperature — for both gelato and sorbets. Fine-tune sweetness levels on the fly while the system preserves the texture profile you've dialled in.
feature8.title: Supplier Integration
feature8.desc: Connect your suppliers and send ingredient orders directly from your production plan. When you submit a plan, gelatops automatically dispatches the shopping list to your supplier — no phone calls, no emails, no manual re-entry.
how.heading: From plan to production in minutes
how1.title: Set up your recipes
how1.desc: Add your gelato and sorbet recipes with ingredient amounts per litre. Set prices for each ingredient.
how2.title: Add what you need to produce
how2.desc: Add items to the production queue manually — choose the recipe and quantity. If you have an online shop, incoming orders can land here automatically via webhook.
how3.title: Build your production plan
how3.desc: Review the queue, assign items to dated production runs, adjust quantities, and check the cost summary before committing.
how4.title: Submit and order
how4.desc: Submit the plan. Get a frozen shopping list with quantities and prices locked. Print it, export it — or let gelatops send the order to your supplier automatically. Make gelato.
